curation.synopsis: On the burning city-spires of Prospero, the Space Wolves' Thirteenth Great Company hunts the last of the Thousand Sons through the rubble. When a fleeing sorcerer slips between teleportation-portals to escape their wrath, Sergeant Bulveye and his pack give chase, plunging into a magical maze that bends space and memory around them. Every doorway they break breaks the maze a little further, and every leap takes them somewhere stranger, until the warriors of the Rout can no longer be sure which Prospero they will step out into — or which century. A short, hard-edged piece that gives a first answer to a famous question — why the entire 13th Great Company vanished after the Burning of Prospero and was not seen again for ten thousand years.
